[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a screenshot of a Windows Media Player window displaying a blank white screen with a small 3D figure and large text.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a computer media player interface. Inside the playback area, there is a simple gray 3D human-like figure with a round head, smooth body, and arms held out to the sides with palms facing slightly upward. On the left side of the white playback area, large black text reads “serah” on one line, “lu” on the next, and “dah” on the next.

Setting:
The scene is indoors in the context of a computer desktop application screenshot. The background around the player window is out of focus and appears bluish with soft shapes, suggesting a desktop wallpaper or blurred screen content. Lighting is uniform like a screen capture.

Visual Details:
The media player window has a blue header bar with a window icon on the left and three control buttons on the right (minimize, maximize, and close). Below the header, there is a classic menu bar with “File,” “View,” “Play,” “Tools,” and “Help.” The playback area is a large white rectangle bordered by darker gray/blue edges. At the bottom of the interface, there is a blue control bar with circular play controls on the left, various small transport buttons, and a long progress slider toward the center-right with a green fill and a green indicator block. The overall composition is centered, with the 3D figure on the right side of the white area and the large text on the left.

Visible Text:
Windows Media Player
File
View
Play
Tools
Help
serah
lu
dah

Practical Summary:
This image is a screenshot of Windows Media Player. It shows a white playback window with large text on the left and a gray 3D figure with arms out on the right.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
